description: Files that MUST appear in impact analysis answers for common change types in the agent-context toolchain.

bump_cli_version.description: Cut a new agent-context release (vX.Y.Z). The four test-enforced surfaces below MUST agree (validated by tests/test_version_drift.py). RELEASE_NOTES.md is convention.

edit_markdown_template.description: Modify a markdown template under templates/. Mirror is regenerated by sync-from-canonical.sh.

edit_json_template.description: Modify a JSON template under templates/. Mirror is regenerated by sync-from-canonical.sh.

add_cli_subcommand.description: Add a new subcommand to the agent-context CLI.

add_result_schema_field.description: Extend the v3 experiment-result schema with a new field.

add_agent_extractor.description: Wire a new agent's session JSONL into the schema-v3 pipeline.

edit_skill_flow.description: Change the 10-step fill flow that agents run after init.

edit_deck.description: Change deck content or design. talk/cursor-meetup-may-2026.html is the canonical hand-authored source. Refresh the index.html copy and re-render the PDF in the same commit.

edit_ci_workflow.description: Change CI behaviour (unit suite, verify-on-examples, release packaging, Pages deploy).

_rules.contractually_required_files: Exact paths only. Every path must exist on disk.
_rules.required_file_families: Shell glob patterns using * wildcards. Every pattern must match >= 1 real file. Template-variable placeholders are not allowed.
